title: Harden Playwright browser tool reliability
description: Reliability sweep for all Playwright-backed browser tools: session recovery, shared action status, verified navigate/read/inspect/click/input/form/scroll/back/WhatsApp behavior, browser_status diagnostics, conservative action success handling, and regression tests.
close_reason: Implemented browser reliability hardening: centralized Playwright lifecycle/status helpers, verified navigate/read/click/input/form/scroll/back/WhatsApp results, browser_status tool, conservative submit/send guard, and regression coverage.

title: Harden WhatsApp Web browser automation flow
description: WhatsApp-in-Brave turns still bypass Playwright tools because they classify as APP/UNKNOWN and stale denial history remains in context. Add WhatsApp Web tools, route WhatsApp browser-hosted commands to BROWSER, maintain pending WhatsApp compose state, prevent fake send acknowledgements, and reduce pre-tool streaming latency.
close_reason: Implemented WhatsApp Web browser automation hardening, deterministic send guard, history sanitization, streaming suppression, and regression tests.

title: Fix browser agent refusal and Playwright flow
description: Browser-capable turns can still refuse without running Playwright because stale denial/test history pollutes LLM context and generic browser/app tools crowd automation tools. Implement prompt/history sanitization, browser refusal recovery, browser_read_current, selector ordering, and keep browser sessions alive across IDLE.
close_reason: Implemented browser history sanitization, browser refusal retry/fallback, browser_read_current, Playwright-first tool selection, and kept browser sessions open across IDLE. Full backend suite passed: 252 tests.

title: Fix event-queue backpressure killing callback delivery
description: live.py _enqueue_event returns before firing callbacks when queue full; queue never drained in prod. Fire callbacks first, make queue best-effort. Same for classic.py log spam.
close_reason: live.py fires callbacks before queue; both engines best-effort enqueue, no error spam

title: Fix selector: new browser tools never selected + 5-tool cap
description: selector.py never adds browser_inspect/scroll/go_back and caps at 5 tools, truncating browser toolset. Add tools + category-aware cap.
close_reason: Added browser_inspect/scroll/go_back to selector; raised cap to 10 for BROWSER

title: Fix classifier: web-read/search intent misrouted to APP
description: classifier.py evaluates APP block before BROWSER; 'buka brave dan cari X' classifies as APP so only open_app/close_app reach the LLM. Add web-action guard before APP block.
close_reason: Added web-action guard before APP block; web-read/search requests now route to BROWSER

title: Fix & harden browser agent end-to-end
description: Browser tools implemented but fail at runtime: intent misclassification, selector gaps, and event-queue backpressure killing callback delivery. Parent tracking issue.
close_reason: All four child fixes landed; 248 tests pass

title: Fix state transition crash on playback_start trigger
description: Add safety checks to ensure playback_started is only called when the state machine is in the PREPARING_AUDIO state in orchestrator.py fallback playback loops, avoiding InvalidTransitionErrors.

title: Add browser click-by-intent and form automation
description: Add higher-level Playwright browser tools for natural-language clicking and form filling: click by text, role, best-match metadata scoring, and multi-field form filling with optional submit. Keep existing low-level selector tools and add regression tests.
close_reason: Implemented browser click-by-intent tools, form fill automation, prompt/selector integration, anti-fake-success guard, and regression tests.

title: Harden browser.py: single-thread Playwright executor + timeout tuning
description: sync_playwright globals shared across asyncio.to_thread pool threads cause thread-affinity crashes in multi-step sessions. Pin to single worker thread; tune hardcoded waits.
close_reason: Pinned Playwright calls to single thread; added goto timeout + reduced fixed waits

title: Write and run automated tests for browser agent tools in tests/test_browser_agent.py
description: Create tests/test_browser_agent.py to verify launch_persistent_context, browser_inspect tagging, numeric clicks/fills, scrolling, and history back navigation.
close_reason: Successfully wrote and ran automated tests for browser agent tools, achieving 100% pass rate.

title: Register and default-enable new browser tools in registry.py and config.py
description: Add browser_inspect, browser_scroll, and browser_go_back to registry.py's build_default_registry() and config.py's ToolsConfig.enabled.
close_reason: Registered browser_inspect, browser_scroll, and browser_go_back in registry.py and enabled them in config.py.

title: Implement element tagging, scroll, and back tools in browser.py
description: Add browser_inspect(), browser_scroll(), and browser_go_back() in browser.py. Update browser_click() and browser_input() to support numeric selector translation.
close_reason: Successfully implemented browser_inspect(), browser_scroll(), browser_go_back() and numeric selector conversion inside browser_click() and browser_input().

title: Implement browser persistent context and headful mode in browser.py
description: Refactor browser.py _ensure_browser() and browser_close() to use launch_persistent_context and run headfully (headless=False).
close_reason: Successfully refactored browser.py to support launch_persistent_context and run headfully, and updated existing tests.

title: Add advanced local Spotify control tools
description: Implement set_spotify_volume, get_spotify_volume, skip_music, and get_now_playing tools using AppleScript on macOS.
notes: (1) Perubahan ini menambahkan tool AppleScript Spotify baru di backend untuk mengatur volume, skip, dan melihat info lagu yang sedang diputar. Tidak ada perubahan UI. (2) Uji manual dengan menyalakan Spotify desktop di Mac dan berikan instruksi suara seperti 'Lagu apa ini?' atau 'Kecilkan volume Spotify ke 30'.

title: Phase 3.5: Implement Tool Confirmation and Safety Approval Flow
description: Introduce an approval/confirmation layer inside ToolRegistry and Orchestrator. Categorize tools by risk level. Intercept medium/high risk commands to ask the user for confirmation (voice/UI) before execution, continuing on yes and canceling/logging on no.

title: [Epic] Phase 3.5 — Voice UX Hardening
description: Strengthen the core voice assistant architecture for natural turn-taking, barge-in, observability, safety, and error recovery.

title: Logging & debugging tools
description:
Why: Improve developer diagnostics and troubleshooting of audio streams, LLM calls, and state transitions.
What:
- Implement persistent file logging for all events, transcriptions, and API calls.
- Build a diagnostic panel in the frontend React app to inspect recent WebSocket logs.

title: Error handling & graceful degradation
description:
Why: Provide robust fallbacks when APIs or tools fail, and notify user gracefully in the UI instead of freezing.
What:
- Handle tool failures gracefully by returning an error message to the LLM.
- Implement UI alerts/toasts for connection losses (WebSocket server/client disconnects).
- Gracefully fall back to text response if TTS synthesis fails.

title: [Epic] Phase 3 — Polish & Extended Tools
description:
Why: Finalize the MVP with a polished user experience, settings UI, onboarding wizard, error handling, and robust tools.
What:
- Edge-TTS integration (replacing ElevenLabs)
- Graceful error handling and connectivity fallbacks
- Conversation mode (follow-up window)
- Extended toolset (weather, notes, calendar, reminders)
- Settings UI and onboarding setup flow
- Diagnostic logging tools
Milestone: Production-ready experience.

title: P7: Implement Persistent Voice Session Engine
description: Add VoiceEngine abstraction and a persistent speech-to-speech engine class (such as Gemini Live) for smooth server-side VAD, streaming audio responses, and built-in barge-in. For detailed specs, read improvement.md.
notes:
(1) Perubahan ini murni di bagian backend (logic, abstraction layer, dan adapter engine) sehingga elemen baru/yang diubah tidak muncul di UI sama sekali. Pengerasan (hardening) mencakup thread-safety callback, bounded event queue, error connection broadcast, dan pencegahan penumpukan audio basi.
(2) Panduan pengujian manual:
1. Pastikan config di ~/.verse/config.toml menggunakan engine classic (secara default `voice.engine = "classic_pipeline"`).
2. Jalankan aplikasi backend menggunakan `./run-app`.
3. Lakukan interaksi suara dengan asisten (tekan/tahan hotkey alt+space lalu berbicara). Pastikan asisten mendengar, merespons, dan memproses perkataan Anda secara normal.
4. Ganti `voice.engine` ke `"gemini_live"` di config.toml. Jika API key Gemini belum dipasang di keychain Anda, pastikan sistem secara anggun (graceful) memberikan log peringatan di terminal dan secara otomatis melakukan fallback kembali ke classic pipeline tanpa ada crash.
5. Jalankan unit test secara offline dengan perintah: `cd backend && poetry run pytest tests/test_engines.py` untuk memastikan mock-driven testing untuk kedua engine berjalan 100% passed (seluruh 10 skenario pengetesan lulus).

title: P4: Implement TurnContext and Turn Cancellation on Barge-in
description:
Implement full, reliable turn cancellation:
1. Create a TurnContext class tracking turn ID, active cancel event, reference to active tasks (LLM, TTS, playback, tools), and metadata.
2. Intercept and drop callbacks, state transitions, audio packets, and UI emissions if their turn_id does not match the active current_turn.
3. Implement cancel_current_turn() to immediately halt active LLM streams, TTS tasks, tool loops, clear audio player queues, and start mic listening on barge-in.
4. Allow user speech to trigger immediate turn cancellation even during non-speaking stages like THINKING and PREPARING_AUDIO.
For detailed specs, read improvement.md.
notes:
Ringkasan: Implementasi pembatalan per-turn untuk barge-in sudah ditambahkan di backend. Tidak ada layar, sidebar, tombol, menu, atau layout UI baru. Perubahan perilaku muncul di permukaan interaksi suara yang sudah ada: saat pengguna melakukan barge-in, teks asisten/audio/tool callback dari turn lama dicegah agar tidak muncul atau diputar setelah turn baru dimulai.

Lokasi perilaku yang perlu ditinjau: interaksi suara utama/voice conversation yang sudah ada, khususnya saat aplikasi sedang THINKING, PREPARING_AUDIO, atau SPEAKING dan pengguna mulai berbicara/menekan hotkey lagi.

Panduan uji manual:
1. Jalankan aplikasi dan mulai satu percakapan suara yang memicu respons LLM streaming.
2. Saat status masih berpikir atau sebelum audio mulai, tekan hotkey/mulai bicara lagi untuk barge-in. Pastikan turn lama berhenti dan aplikasi masuk listening tanpa teks jawaban lama yang menyusul.
3. Ulangi saat audio asisten sedang disiapkan atau diputar. Pastikan audio lama berhenti/bersih cepat dan tidak ada potongan audio lama yang diputar setelah listening baru aktif.
4. Uji prompt yang memicu tool lambat, lalu lakukan barge-in sebelum tool selesai. Pastikan hasil tool lama tidak muncul sebagai callback/teks asisten.
5. Lakukan percakapan normal tanpa barge-in untuk memastikan streaming LLM, TTS, tool, debug logging, dan memory tetap berjalan seperti sebelumnya.

Uji otomatis yang sudah dijalankan: `cd backend && poetry run pytest` -> 225 passed; `cd frontend && npm run build` -> berhasil.
